message:
fix(e2e/bench): retry on BusySnapshot/Busy in comprehensive-bench (fixes BENCH-YELLOW panic)

The comprehensive-bench harness panicked at Section 2 (autocommit 1000
rows) with `BusySnapshot { conflicting_pages: "1,2,4" }` because every
fsqlite mutation site was wrapped with a bare `.unwrap()`. BusySnapshot
is FrankenSQLite's MVCC analogue of SQLITE_BUSY under WAL: it is
transient and must be retried with backoff, otherwise contention on
shared structures (single-connection cache, pager, snapshot compaction)
deterministically kills the run.

Changes (bench-only; fsqlite library untouched):

- Added `retry_on_busy(op)` helper with bounded exponential backoff:
  starting 100us, doubling per attempt, shift clamped at 10 (so max
  wait ~100ms), up to BENCH_BUSY_MAX_RETRIES=32 attempts.
- Added `is_busy_like(err)` matcher covering FrankenError variants:
  BusySnapshot, Busy, BusyRecovery, DatabaseLocked, LockFailed.
- Added wrappers `fs_execute(&conn, sql)` and
  `fs_stmt_execute_with_params(&stmt, params)` that panic only after
  retries are exhausted or on non-busy errors.
- Replaced `.unwrap()` on every fsqlite mutation call site
  (BEGIN/COMMIT/CREATE TABLE/CREATE INDEX/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and
  `stmt.execute_with_params(...).unwrap()`) across Sections 1-10:
  insert-by-row-count, insert-by-txn-strategy (autocommit + batched +
  single), insert-by-record-size, concurrent writers (fsqlite arm),
  read-after-write setup, update/delete, mixed OLTP seed, JOIN setup,
  subquery/CTE setup, and string-operations setup.
- rusqlite call sites are unchanged (they already get SQLITE_BUSY
  handling from `busy_timeout`).

Verification:

- `rch exec -- cargo build --release -p fsqlite-e2e --bin
  comprehensive-bench`: OK.
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy --release -p fsqlite-e2e --bin
  comprehensive-bench -- -D warnings`: clean.
- `rch exec -- cargo run --release -p fsqlite-e2e --bin
  comprehensive-bench -- --quick --no-html --json-stdout`: exit=0,
  26.3s, all 14 sections completed, 93 scenarios measured
  (42 franken_faster / 51 csqlite_faster / avg ratio 12.46), no
  panics, no BusySnapshot errors reached the harness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
